title: Manifest Printing Utility
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest' directory houses the 'ManifestPrinter.java' utility. This tool aids in debugging and monitoring by printing manifest file contents to an output stream. It loads data from a specified file using Hadoop FileSystem, taking the manifest file path as a command-line argument. The utility outputs diagnostics and I/O statistics, following a utility pattern for system debugging and performance analysis.
